channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: ‘The world is sounding an alarm’: Why big tech is the new colonist
item.description: Power is no longer exercised through military force alone, but via technology, finance and control over information.

item.title: What to expect from the 48-team format at the World Cup 2026
item.description: Al Jazeera examines key talking points related to the introduction of an expanded 48-nation tournament.

item.title: Israeli minister blasts Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal for Palestinian flag wave
item.description: Spanish international Lamine Yamal criticised for waving Palestinian flag during bus parade celebrating La Liga title.

item.title: Trump, Xi discuss Strait of Hormuz as Chinese vessels transit key waterway
item.description: White House says the two leaders agree that the strait 'must remain open to support the free flow of energy'.

item.title: Saudi investment fund seals FIFA deal as official World Cup 2026 supporter
item.description: PIF deal covers the 2026 World Cup being cohosted by US, Canada and Mexico, while Saudi Arabia is hosting 2034 edition.

item.title: ‘Never mess it up’: What Xi and Trump said on day one of Beijing talks
item.description: Xi and Trump agree to frame their relationship as 'constructive, strategic and stable' on the first day of talks.

item.title: Why international law can’t stop mass atrocities
item.description: Law can hold power to account in theory, but has it been enough?

item.title: BRICS meeting overshadowed by war on Iran
item.description: BRICS meeting overshadowed by war on Iran

item.title: Iran still waiting for US visas less than a month before World Cup
item.description: Farewell ceremony for Iran's football team in Tehran on Wednesday, but US visas yet to be issued reports media.

item.title: Russian drone attack hits Kyiv apartment block during ceasefire
item.description: Russian drone strikes collapsed a residential building in the Ukrainian capital.

item.title: What is on the table during Lebanon-Israel direct negotiations?
item.description: Israel and Lebanon will meet for the third time this year to discuss a ceasefire and disarming Hezbollah.

item.title: Serie A finish in chaos, worsened by clash with Italian Open tennis final
item.description: Serie A hit by final weekend chaos multiplied by Italian Open men’s tennis final booked in same venue as Rome derby.

item.title: Latvian prime minister resigns after drone incident
item.description: Latvian Prime Minister Evika Silina resigns after several incidents involving stray drones suspected to be from Ukraine.

item.title: Duststorms and lightning kill at least 96 people in northern India
item.description: Storms are common in northern India from March to June, before the annual monsoon rains arrive.

item.title: China’s Xi warns Trump about Taiwan at Beijing summit
item.description: The Chinese leader cautions the US president that disagreement over Taiwan could send relations down a dangerous path.

item.title: Britain’s Health Secretary Wes Streeting resigns from government
item.description: Streeting said he no longer had 'confidence' in Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s leadership.

item.title: Trump and Xi hail ‘most important’ relationship
item.description: US President Donald Trump described his country’s relationship with China as ‘one of the most consequential’.

item.title: Ronda Rousey vs Gina Carano Netflix MMA fight: Card, start, how to watch
item.description: Trailblazing mixed martial arts fighters end lengthy retirements for highly-anticipated bout to be shown on Netflix.

item.title: Labour’s Angela Rayner says she has been cleared over UK tax affairs
item.description: Rayner says she has been cleared by HMRC, paving the way for a potential Labour leadership challenge.

item.title: Two killed as Israel ramps up southern Lebanon attacks ahead of US talks
item.description: Lebanon and Israel are expected to hold talks on extending the ceasefire in Washington.

item.title: Zimbabweans lured into Russia’s war as families plead for their return
item.description: Families call on governments in Moscow and Harare to secure the return of loved ones from Ukrainian front lines.

item.title: Who are the US CEOs in China with Trump, and what’s in it for them?
item.description: Top executives hope to expand their businesses in China as Trump aims for win ahead of midterm vote.

item.title: Russia launches hundreds more drones at Ukraine, killing three people
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says Russia fired 'more than 1,560 drones' at Ukraine since Wednesday.

item.title: World Cup train and shuttle bus ticket prices cut in New York, New Jersey
item.description: Round-trip train tickets brought down to $98 from $150, and bus fares to cost $20 instead of $80, state officials say.

item.title: Could Iran war trigger a hunger crisis?
item.description: The UN warns disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz could drive up food and fertiliser costs, and worsen global hunger.
